ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was manufactured */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was last maintained */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike (e.g., available, rented, maintenance) */,
  "last_location" TEXT /* Last known location of the bike */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level for electric bikes */,
  "last_service_mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage at the last service */,
  "total_rentals" INTEGER /* Total number of times the bike has been rented */,
  "total_mileage" REAL /* Total mileage of the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental */,
  "bike_id" TEXT /* ID of the bike being rented */,
  "rental_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was rented */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was returned */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the year (1 = spring, 2 = summer, 3 = autumn, 4 = winter) */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Whether the rental date is a holiday (0 = no, 1 = yes) */,
  "workingday" INTEGER /* Whether the rental date is a working day (0 = no, 1 = yes) */,
  "weather" INTEGER /* Weather conditions on the rental date (1 = clear, 2 = cloudy, 3 = rainy) */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the rental started */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the rental ended */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the rental in minutes */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rented the bike */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the rental */,
  "rental_cost" REAL /* Cost of the rental */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User rating for the bike or rental experience */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* User feedback or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_weather FOREIGN KEY ("weather") REFERENCES weather ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature on the rental date */,
  "atmospheric_temperature" REAL /* Atmospheric temperature on the rental date */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity on the rental date */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed on the rental date */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather condition */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation */,
  "visibility" INTEGER /* Visibility conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the station (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "total_bikes" INTEGER /* Total number of bikes currently at the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_station" (
  "bike_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike-station combination */,
  "bike_id" TEXT /* ID of the bike */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Availability of the bike at the station (0 = not available, 1 = available) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update time of the bike's availability */,
  "distance_to_next_station" REAL /* Distance to the nearest station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_station_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_station_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, maintenance) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the system was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser and device) used to access the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed (e.g., login, logout, data access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counts" (
  "count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each count */,
  "rental_date" TEXT /* Date when the bikes were rented */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of bikes rented on that day */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "total_rentals" INTEGER /* Total number of rentals */,
  "average_rental_duration" REAL /* Average duration of rentals */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("count_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bike_id" TEXT /* ID of the bike being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "next_scheduled_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Person or team who performed the maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)
